articles.title: Algorand-powered DeFi solution Yieldly hosting IDO on TrustSwap Launchpad
articles.description: CryptoNinjas » Algorand-powered DeFi solution Yieldly hosting IDO on TrustSwap Launchpad TrustSwap, a full-service digital asset services platform, has begun hosting the IDO for the launch of Yieldly, a DeFi solution built on top of the Algorand blockchain. Yieldly’s bridge products and AMM/DEX are expected to open the Algorand ecosystem for many use-cases. This includes yield farming,...
